description: Picked option B over option C. Option C — `cards/_characters/caterpie-line.md` cohort node — is premature: corpus has 3 prints across 2 of 3 species, with Butterfree absent. Charizard-line precedent had three species across six prints when it was built; Caterpie-line is short two species and a print of coverage. So the call is the cleanest single edge: the in-set adjacent-collector-number evolution mirror RBC-001 ↔ RBC-002, with the cross-print pointer to the existing Evolutions Caterpie (EVO-3) called out in the bullet text. When Butterfree lands in a future Collectr upload, the cohort-node case opens and a Mr. Nodeley pass can commission it cleanly. Standard mirror, sighed-but-mirrored.
other_candidates_considered: Option C: `cards/_characters/caterpie-line.md` cohort node — premature, corpus short Butterfree. Re-evaluate at next CSV upload.
Option B+: cross-print bullet RBC-001 ↔ EVO-3 in same Connections section — folded as in-bullet pointer rather than separate edge to stay one-edge-per-invocation.
